Class Trick

java.lang.Object
whistapp.domain.Trick
public class Trick extends Object

    A method for adding cards to this trick.

    A simple getter for finding the current player playing in this trick.

  • Constructor Details

    • Trick

      public Trick(Player startingPlayer)

  • Method Details

    • addCard

      protected void addCard(Card card, ArrayList<Player> players) throws IllegalStateException, IllegalArgumentException
      A method for adding cards to this trick.
      Parameters:
      card - The card to add.
      players - The players playing this trick.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - All players already played.
      IllegalArgumentException - The given player already played a card.

    • playCardFromCurrentPlayerHand

      public void playCardFromCurrentPlayerHand(String card, ArrayList<Player> players) throws IllegalStateException, IllegalArgumentException
      A method for playing a card from the current player's hand. The current player gets moved to the next player automatically.
      Parameters:
      card - The card to play.
      players - The players playing in this game.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - All players already played.
      IllegalArgumentException - The given player already played a card.

    • determineWinner

      public Player determineWinner(Suit trumpSuit) throws IllegalStateException
      A method determining the winning player of this trick given the trump suit in the current round.
      Parameters:
      trumpSuit - The current trump suit of the round, if there is no trump suit, this should be null.
      Returns:
      The winner of this trick.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - Not all players have played a card in this trick.

    • getCardsAsStrings

      public LinkedHashMap<Player,String> getCardsAsStrings()
      A simple getter for finding the cards played per player.

    • getLeadSuit

      public Suit getLeadSuit()
      A simple getter for finding hte leading suit of this trick.

    • getCurrentPlayer

      public Player getCurrentPlayer()
      A simple getter for finding the current player playing in this trick.

    • isOver

      public boolean isOver()
      A simple method to check if the trick is fully played.
